description: Evaluate hedge fund strategies — equity L/S, dedicated short, market neutral, merger arb, distressed, relative value, global macro, managed futures, and conditional factor risk model analysis

fields.name: strategy_type
fields.label: long_short_equity | dedicated_short | market_neutral | merger_arb | distressed | fi_arbitrage | convertible_arb | global_macro | managed_futures | volatility | multistrategy

equity_strategies.long_short_equity: Long alpha stocks, short overvalued; net long bias typical
equity_strategies.dedicated_short: Net short; profits from market declines; contrarian vs consensus
equity_strategies.market_neutral: Zero net exposure; profits from stock-picking alpha

event_driven.merger_arbitrage: Long target, short acquirer; capture spread; risk = deal break
event_driven.distressed: Deep value in stressed/defaulted securities; illiquid; catalysts needed

relative_value.fi_arbitrage: Exploit yield curve, credit spread, or liquidity mispricings; high leverage
relative_value.convertible_arb: Long convertible, short equity; delta-neutral; earn yield + credit spread

opportunistic.global_macro: Top-down macro views in FX, rates, equities, commodities
opportunistic.managed_futures: Systematic trend-following (CTA); long vol, negative skew in reversals

specialist.volatility_trading: Long gamma via options; short vol via variance swaps
specialist.reinsurance: Cat bonds, life settlements; uncorrelated insurance risk

multi_manager.fund_of_funds: Diversified exposure; double fee layer; due diligence outsourced
multi_manager.multi_strategy: Single fund with multiple desks; capital allocated dynamically

classification_keys.risk_exposures: Equity beta, credit beta, duration, vol, macro
classification_keys.liquidity: Capital lock-up, redemption terms, asset liquidity mismatch

conditional_factor_risk_model.unconditional: Single set of factor loadings regardless of market
conditional_factor_risk_model.conditional: Factor exposures change with market regime
conditional_factor_risk_model.portfolio_contribution: Marginal contribution to Sharpe of 60/40 portfolio

errors.message: strategy_type must be one of the supported hedge fund strategies

anti_patterns.rule: Do not assess hedge funds with unconditional betas only
anti_patterns.why: Many hedge funds exhibit strong positive beta in down markets (crisis alpha disappears); conditional factor models separate up-market from down-market beta

anti_patterns.rule: Do not use reported returns without adjusting for illiquidity and smoothing
anti_patterns.why: Infrequent pricing of illiquid positions creates autocorrelation that inflates the Sharpe ratio — adjust with autocorrelation correction

anti_patterns.rule: Do not assume fund-of-funds diversification is free
anti_patterns.why: Double fees (management + performance) reduce net Sharpe materially; the fee drag must be weighed against correlation reduction and manager access benefits

related.reason: Builds on L1 foundations — prerequisite before this level's material

goals.description: Evaluate hedge fund strategies — equity L/S, dedicated short, market neutral, merger arb, distressed, relative value, global macro, managed futures, and conditional factor risk model analysis

success_metrics.measurement: All decisions have complete audit trails

constraints.description: All operations must be auditable and traceable

tradeoffs.reason: trading operations require precise execution and full audit trails

invariants: error messages never expose internal system details
